statement: Agent Skills became an open cross-platform standard (Dec 2025) adopted by OpenAI; the platforms themselves now carry portability, so a third-party build-time resolver for skill portability is a thin wrapper the vendors have already absorbed.

evidence.quote: We've published Agent Skills as an open standard for cross-platform portability. (December 18, 2025).
In December 2025, Anthropic released the Agent Skills specification as an open standard, and OpenAI adopted the same format for Codex CLI and ChatGPT.

falsifier: Demonstrate the open SKILL.md standard does NOT cover the multi-platform divergence agent-enterprise resolves (Copilot/Cursor still use incompatible native formats) and that this divergence is durable rather than converging.
